---
pagetitle: "StudyStats — How it works"
description: "From research question to defended thesis: a transparent, deadline-driven consulting process for health researchers."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
css: styles.css
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .ss-hiw{max-width:1080px;margin:0 auto;padding:3rem 1.25rem 1rem}
  .ss-hiw h1{font-size:clamp(1.9rem,3.4vw,2.6rem);margin:0 0 .5rem;text-align:center;letter-spacing:-.5px}
  .ss-hiw .lead{text-align:center;color:#b8b8b8;max-width:720px;margin:0 auto 2.5rem;font-size:1.05rem;line-height:1.55}
  .ss-stage{background:#1b1b1b;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;border-radius:12px;padding:1.75rem 1.75rem;margin:1rem 0;position:relative;display:grid;grid-template-columns:64px 1fr;gap:1.25rem;align-items:start}
  .ss-stage .num{background:#fff;color:#121212;width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;font-size:1.15rem}
  .ss-stage h2{margin:0 0 .35rem;font-size:1.25rem;color:#fff}
  .ss-stage .meta{color:#9a9a9a;font-size:.82rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin:0 0 .85rem}
  .ss-stage p{color:#cfcfcf;line-height:1.6;margin:0 0 .6rem;font-size:.96rem}
  .ss-stage ul{color:#bdbdbd;margin:.4rem 0 0;padding-left:1.1rem;line-height:1.55;font-size:.93rem}
  .ss-stage ul li{margin-bottom:.25rem}
  .ss-arrow{text-align:center;color:#4a4a4a;font-size:1.4rem;margin:.25rem 0;line-height:1}
  .ss-callout{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1b1b1b,#2a2a2a);border:1px solid #2a2a2a;border-radius:12px;padding:1.75rem 1.5rem;margin:2.5rem 0}
  .ss-callout h3{margin:0 0 .5rem;font-size:1.1rem}
  .ss-callout p{color:#cfcfcf;margin:0;line-height:1.55;font-size:.95rem}
  .ss-promise-grid{display:grid;gap:1rem;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));margin:2rem 0 0}
  .ss-promise{background:#1b1b1b;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;border-radius:10px;padding:1.25rem 1.25rem}
  .ss-promise h4{margin:0 0 .35rem;font-size:.98rem;color:#fff}
  .ss-promise p{color:#bdbdbd;margin:0;font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.5}
  .ss-cta-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.75rem;justify-content:center;margin-top:1rem}
  .ss-btn{display:inline-block;padding:.85rem 1.6rem;border-radius:6px;font-weight:600;font-size:1rem;text-decoration:none!important;border:1.5px solid transparent;transition:transform .08s,box-shadow .15s,background .15s}
  .ss-btn-primary{background:#fff;color:#121212!important}
  .ss-btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(255,255,255,.12)}
  .ss-btn-secondary{background:transparent;color:#fff!important;border-color:#fff}
  .ss-btn-secondary:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08)}
  .ss-final{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1b1b1b,#2a2a2a);border:1px solid #2a2a2a;border-radius:14px;padding:2.5rem 1.5rem;text-align:center;margin:3rem auto 5rem;max-width:900px}
  .ss-final h2{margin:0 0 .5rem}
  .ss-final p{color:#cfcfcf;max-width:600px;margin:0 auto 1.25rem}
  @media (max-width:520px){.ss-stage{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding:1.4rem}.ss-stage .num{margin-bottom:.5rem}}
</style>
```

::: {.ss-hiw}

# How it works

::: {.lead}
A simple, predictable process — built around your deadline. From the first call to your final defence, you always know what's next, what's due, and what it costs.
:::

<div class="ss-stage">
<div class="num">1</div>
<div>
<h2>Free 15-min discovery call</h2>
<p class="meta">No cost · 15 minutes · video or phone</p>
<p>Tell us your research question, your timeline, and where you're stuck. We'll tell you — honestly — whether we're the right fit, and what a typical engagement for a project like yours looks like.</p>
<ul>
<li>What you bring: research question, deadline, supervisor expectations</li>
<li>What you leave with: a clear next step (or a referral if we're not the right fit)</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="ss-arrow">↓</div>

<div class="ss-stage">
<div class="num">2</div>
<div>
<h2>Scoped, itemised quote</h2>
<p class="meta">Within 48 hours · fixed-fee · no hourly surprises</p>
<p>We send a written quote that lists every deliverable — each table, figure, model and write-up — drawn from a published <a href="rates.qmd">price catalogue</a>. You and your supervisor see exactly what you're paying for. A 50% deposit secures your slot.</p>
<ul>
<li>Per-deliverable pricing (Table 1, regression model, methods section, etc.)</li>
<li>Fixed timeline with milestone dates</li>
<li>Quote valid for 30 days; first round of revisions on each item is included</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="ss-arrow">↓</div>

<div class="ss-stage">
<div class="num">3</div>
<div>
<h2>Analysis &amp; iteration</h2>
<p class="meta">1–4 weeks typical · reproducible R code · weekly check-ins</p>
<p>We clean the data, run the analyses, and build the tables and figures agreed in your quote. You see early drafts within the first week so we can course-correct before things are baked in. Everything ships with the underlying R code so your work is reproducible and defensible.</p>
<ul>
<li>Reproducible R/Quarto workflow you can hand to your supervisor</li>
<li>Publication-ready tables and figures</li>
<li>Methods text drafted in parallel — paste-ready into your thesis or paper</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="ss-arrow">↓</div>

<div class="ss-stage">
<div class="num">4</div>
<div>
<h2>Deliver &amp; defend</h2>
<p class="meta">On-call support through review &amp; defence</p>
<p>Final deliverables are packaged so they drop straight into your manuscript or thesis. We stay available for supervisor revisions, reviewer responses, and defence-prep questions — billed transparently in 30-minute blocks if needed.</p>
<ul>
<li>Final code, data dictionaries, tables, figures and methods text</li>
<li>One round of revisions on each deliverable included free (within 14 days)</li>
<li>Reviewer-response support and defence prep available on request</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="ss-callout">
<h3>What we ask of you</h3>
<p>The fastest projects share three things: a clear research question, ethically-cleared data ready to share, and a responsive supervisor. If you're not there yet, that's fine — we often start with protocol or sample-size work and pick up the analysis once your data is in.</p>
</div>

<h2 style="text-align:center;margin:3rem 0 .5rem;font-size:1.5rem;">Our promises to you</h2>

<div class="ss-promise-grid">
<div class="ss-promise"><h4>Plain language</h4><p>No statistical jargon you can't defend yourself in a viva.</p></div>
<div class="ss-promise"><h4>Reproducible by default</h4><p>Every analysis ships with R code your supervisor can re-run.</p></div>
<div class="ss-promise"><h4>No scope creep</h4><p>If something changes, we re-quote <em>before</em> the work, not after.</p></div>
<div class="ss-promise"><h4>Confidentiality</h4><p>Your data, protocol and ideas stay yours. NDA on request.</p></div>
</div>

:::

::: {.ss-final}
## Ready to start?
Book the free 15-minute call — bring your question and your deadline.

::: {.ss-cta-row}
<a href="contact.qmd" class="ss-btn ss-btn-primary">Book a free 15-min consult →</a>
<a href="rates.qmd" class="ss-btn ss-btn-secondary">See pricing</a>
:::
:::
